title: polystichum aculeatum
intro: Polystichum aculeatum, also known as the needle fern or prickly shield fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Polystichum aculeatum are attributed to its high content of fumaric acid, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Polystichum aculeatum is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and it can also be used in topical applications such as creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
